name: Kelvin Wiki
description: Query the KelvinClaw documentation via DeepWiki (mcp.deepwiki.com).

topic.description: A DeepWiki documentation topic to fetch. Use the exact topic name shown in the table of contents (call with no arguments first to see available topics). Example: 'Architecture Overview', 'Plugin System'. Cannot be combined with 'question'.

question.description: A natural-language question about the KelvinClaw repository. DeepWiki will answer it from the codebase. Example: 'How does the plugin trust model work?', 'What channels does the gateway support?'. Cannot be combined with 'topic'.
